title: Last Resort [Cobblemon 1.7]
description: Adds more ways to get resources from your Pokemon... and possibly consume them?
body:
**"Pick clean the bones of Pokémon caught in the sea or stream.
Thank them for the meals they provide, and pick their bones clean.
When the bones are as clean as can be, set them free in the water from which they came.
The Pokémon will return, fully fleshed, and it begins anew."**

One would guess that that folklore is the most widely known story from Sinnoh's Canalave City library. The Pokédex has also stated several times that some Pokémon possess the ability to _produce food items_, or _regrow body parts_ they discard. So forget the implications of snacking on your Pokémon's body parts, and focus on the exquisite taste instead!

**Reintroducing "Last Resort", a mod to that adds more interactions and new items for Cobblemon 1.7.1!!** (Previously an addon for Shearems mod!)


![Klawf seems surprised that you just cut off his pincers like that.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/67e990873a87172c11d24d845481485387cd3903.png)


Stuck somewhere with nothing to eat, with an inventory full of loot and hunger points that keep dwindling down until your eventual doom? Worry not and count on your pals for emergency snacks, at least until you can find a way back! Or even if you just enjoy eating them, no judgment.

**With this mod, you can get new loot from various Pokemon by interacting with them using various items and tools like the **bonemeal, bucket, shears, and brush.** You do have to capture a Pokemon first before exploiting them!**



Your Pokemon models also change accordingly when you get their items, so you might feel horrible looking at pincerless crab Pokemon walking around but hey, at least you got a good meal out of it!


**Wow, what's that smell? Might have to indulge in some delicious seafood!**

![Smells awesome!](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c780a85dbb6811b93883f0b79751018af10f50cf_0.webp)


Last Resort also allows you to benefit from even more Pokemon through datapacks! Use any tools on any Pokemon, to get any items you'd like. Everything is fully datapackable!
(DATAPACK GUIDE COMING SOON)

**Experience an exquisite Pokemon culinary experience with Last Resort. Anything to survive, right?**

**IMPORTANT:
1. Due to region biases being wonky, Hisuian Bias Oshawott and Dewott will not drop the Black Scalchop for the time being.
2. Pokemon with altered models after being interacted with might not alter their models if they have reskinned variants.**
